items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Bayern eye Tottenham's Archie Gray
items.summary: Tottenham Hotspur midfielder Archie Gray is being considered for a summer move by Bayern Munich and Liverpool. Transfer Talk has the latest.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
